{{Quote|Thank you for your invitation, but no. The Supreme Commander never takes the same risks as the common soldiers. I have my duty, they have theirs.|Estosh|<ref name="Survivor's Quest">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>}}
'''Estosh''' was the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] that was the [[Supreme Commander (Vagaari)|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Vagaari Empire]] who played an important role in the capture of one of the six original [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]] from the ruins of ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. He was born sometime after [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. After disguising himself as a [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] and led the [[Geroon Remnant]], a front to pose as the legitimacy [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] [[Politics/Legends|government]]. Using this pretext, he slipped among the [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|expedition to ''Outbound Flight'']], he later [[Death/Legends|died]] trying to steal a dreadnaught from the [[Outbound Flight Colony]], after using a toxin intended to kill [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]].
